dict.string: Ultron needs microphone access to record your voice for dictation and AI commands.
Ultron needs screen capture access for Vision mode to analyze what's on your screen.
Ultron uses on-device speech recognition to show a live preview of what you're saying in the HUD. No audio leaves your Mac for this preview.
Ultron uses your location to show weather for your area in Uptodate mode. You can also set a city manually in Settings if you prefer.
Ultron shows your next calendar event as a tile in the Cockpit panel. Access is read-only.
Ultron shows your next calendar event as a tile in the Cockpit panel. Access is read-only.
Ultron shows Bluetooth connectivity and connected devices in the Cockpit Handlinger tile. No data is sent anywhere.
